---
title: "Sergio Páez Moncaleano"
subtitle: "Assistant Professor of Statistics – Universidad Nacional de Colombia"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
---

# Welcome

I am a statistician and professor at the Universidad Nacional de Colombia.

My work focuses on Biostatistics.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Research & Teaching

-   Statistical inference
-   Probability theory
-   Statistical computing in R
-   Generalized Linear Models (and extensions)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Teaching materials (in progress)

-   Lecture notes in statistics
-   Simulation-based learning tools
-   R / Quarto interactive content

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Tools

-   R / RStudio
-   Quarto
-   Shiny
-   Python

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Contact

Email: spaezm\@unal.edu.co
